serverNeeds.description: Fetch + persist Lighthouse accessibility/best-practices/SEO category scores alongside performance in PSI calls; extend snapshot shape in performance-store.

serverNeeds.description: Server-computed win/early/flat verdict per published piece, wired to outcome-tracking vocabulary (OutcomeScore/EarlySignal) and serialized on ContentPerformanceItem; verdicts must never be UI-computed (hard floor).
serverNeeds.evidence: No verdict field in ContentPerformanceItem assembly (server/domains/content/content-performance.ts:196-230); vocabulary exists at shared/types/outcome-tracking.ts:47-53 (OutcomeScore) and :126 (EarlySignal)

serverNeeds.description: Content-win → insight graduation write path: new POST route + a new registered InsightType (4-part registration) using existing upsertInsight, with broadcast + addActivity. Quick-win alternative: pre-filled manual form posting to the existing generic outcomes actions route.
serverNeeds.evidence: upsertInsight exists (server/analytics-insights-store.ts:177) and generic POST /api/outcomes/:ws/actions is referenced (shared/types/outcome-tracking.ts comment ~L60); no content-win insight type or graduation route — grep 'graduat' in server/ not attempted for route, no such route in insights.ts (only GET queue + PUT at lines 15,27)

openQuestions.question: C7 term-coverage/brief-execution diagnostic placement (no prototype home).
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Coverage % badge + missing-term chips on the Published card; full joinback panel in the piece Drawer. Dropping is a hard parity stop (FEATURE_AUDIT #503).

openQuestions.question: B2 bulk PageSpeed testing (top-N ≤25, averaged score/vitals, per-page results) absent from mockup — retain or consolidate to single-page?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Retain as a Segmented mode on Page Speed; server capability exists, pure UI cost.

openQuestions.question: B6 field-vs-lab badge and B8 diagnostics — intentional simplification?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Keep both: data already serialized; diagnostics as a collapsed GroupBlock, field/lab as a provenance Badge.

openQuestions.question: C10 delivered-but-not-published items — where do their metrics surface?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Status FilterChip on the Published lens including 'delivered'; server already returns them.

openQuestions.question: C15/C16 verdict + graduation data source and write contract (ledger mislabels verdict as existing).
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Server-side verdict via sn-performance-2 (outcome-tracking vocabulary); graduation = manual pre-filled form first, automatic path deferred to its own plan.

openQuestions.question: C4 aggregate reframing drops total sessions/impressions for outcome-first framing.
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Outcome-first headline tiles + keep GSC/GA4 totals as secondary MetricTiles (client-side sums of returned rows).

openQuestions.question: A5 CSS source filter and C5 sort controls dropped by mockup — intentional?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Keep both: css: rows are real server output and DataTable sorting is free.

openQuestions.question: B14 dead pageWeight.get/analyze client methods — confirm deletion.
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Delete in the rebuild PR; verified unrouted.

openQuestions.question: Does Page 'content-perf' retire when Content Perf folds into the pipeline Published tab, and with what redirect?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Retire per route-removal checklist with a redirect map per D8 (content-perf → pipeline?tab=published) in the consolidation PR.

openQuestions.question: A9 Compress deep-link needs an asset-id/filter receiver param in Asset Manager — who ships the receiver half?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: asset-manager surface owns the receiver (AssetAudit.tsx has no useSearchParams today); performance ships the sender only after that contract lands.

lensesOrTabs: Performance › Page Speed (single + bulk mode via Segmented; mobile/desktop side-by-side)
Content Perf → folds into content-pipeline Published tab + piece Drawer (cross-surface; this surface contributes the metric/coverage card spec)
primitives: DataTable (ranked pages, per-page bulk results, published pieces)
Drawer (per-page asset breakdown, PSI detail, piece joinback panel)
composition.statesPlan: All four per lens: pre-run empty w/ scan CTA, 30-60s contextual loading, rate-limit-aware error w/ retry (GOOGLE_PSI_KEY copy), needsSite lock via shell; snapshot-restore renders stale data with freshness meta.
composition.mountNote: @ds-rebuilt behind ui-rebuild-shell; keep ?tab=speed|weight receiver + SeoAudit deep link; HEAD components fetch via raw useState/useEffect — rebuild adds proper React Query hooks in src/hooks/admin/ (admin-* keys). Must keep calling the same endpoints so performance-store writes + intelligence-cache invalidation keep firing (B12).

crossSurfaceDeps: asset-manager: A8/A9 deep-link receiver contract (filter/asset-id param) — receiver missing at HEAD
content-pipeline: owns the Published tab + drawer where Content Perf lands; shared card/drawer spec and sn-performance-2/-4 consumers
site-audit: inbound deep link (SeoAudit.tsx:552) + its ledger requires a CWV display remaining on Performance
client-portal: shared getContentPerformance handler with public scrub — admin rebuild must not fork response shapes (C13)
insights/engine: sn-performance-3 graduation write path touches insight-store + broadcast contracts
D8: redirect map required if Page 'content-perf' is consolidated into pipeline
unknowns: C8 matrix-sourced items: server serialization verified (source:'matrix'), but whether the pipeline Published mockup's source-chip model renders them distinguishably is unverifiable from a static prototype — verify at build
Whether Asset Manager's compress flow can be invoked per-asset (vs its bulk 'Compress All', AssetAudit.tsx:437) — needed before the A9 full version; deep-link quick win unaffected

verdicts.evidence: server/pagespeed.ts:63 sets category:'performance' only; server/pagespeed.ts:224-227 extractScore reads lighthouseResult.categories.performance exclusively; PageSpeedResult interface (server/pagespeed.ts:22-33) has no accessibility/best-practices/seo category fields. Snapshot persistence is a free JSON `result` column (server/performance-store.ts:17-21,186-188), so extending the stored shape needs no migration/row-mapper lockstep — effort S holds.

The 'no verdict on ContentPerformanceItem' claim is correct (shared/types/content.ts:384-398 has no verdict field; assembly server/domains/content/content-performance.ts:230-254 omits it). BUT the gatherer missed that a server-computed win/early verdict ALREADY exists end-to-end and the hard floor is already met: OutcomeReadback (shared/types/outcome-tracking.ts:471-497) wraps OutcomeScore (:46-53) + DeltaDirection and is server-computed via getScoredOutcomeReadbacks (imported server/content-posts-db.ts:13) then enriched onto GeneratedPost.outcome at the list boundary (server/content-posts-db.ts:314-341, W5.1). CORRECTION: this is NOT net-new derivation — the verdict vocabulary AND the scoring engine exist; the actual work is wiring the existing readback onto ContentPerformanceItem by join (same source-id/targetKeyword pattern as content-posts-db.ts:339), which is closer to S/M than M, and 'verdicts never UI-computed' is already satisfied server-side.

upsertInsight exists at server/analytics-insights-store.ts:177 (confirmed). server/routes/insights.ts has ONLY GET /queue (:15) and PUT /:insightId/resolve (:27) — no POST and no graduation route. No `graduat` route anywhere in server/ (grep hits are doc text in roi.ts/lexicon.ts/outcome-tracking.ts only). No content-win InsightType (grep content_win/content-win/win_insight in server+shared/types/analytics.ts empty). Generic POST /api/outcomes/:workspaceId/actions confirmed at server/routes/outcomes.ts:302; the cited ~L60 reference is the KnownSourceType comment block naming that route (shared/types/outcome-tracking.ts:~60). Effort M is fair (4-part InsightType registration + new POST route + broadcast + addActivity).

getContentPerformance reads a single trailing 90-day window only (server/domains/content/content-performance.ts:196 getAllGscPages(...,90) and :213 getGA4LandingPages(...,90,100)); items map (:230-254) carries only that single gsc/ga4 snapshot with no before/after publish comparison. No engagementLift/impressionsLift/baselineWindow/prePublish/liftPct anywhere in server/ or shared/types/ (grep empty). Effort M is fair — a new pre/post-publish window read + lift computation + serialized field.
